reviews.review_description: Needs more like testing your skills after training! School, office buildings and security situations!

I can't imagine a better way to learn the steps you should take in an active shooter situation. The experience was more intense that I expected, but it felt accurate and not too graphic. It really drove home exactly what I should do if this ever happens. Everyone should take this training!

With healthcare being a 24 hour business, it's hard to find time to provide this training in a safe space away from patients so that their care is not interrupted. This capability, along with visual aid presentations and a hands-on exercise is just what we needed. Keep developing this and get rid of the small bugs I've found so far.
